data.biography: Yannick Renier (born 29 March 1975) is a Belgian actor who started his career in the theatre in the 1990s and has since appeared in several films and television productions. He is brother of actor Jérémie Renier.
data.name: Yannick Renier

data.biography:
Yannick Renier est un acteur belge né le 29 mars 1975 à Bruxelles. Il est le demi-frère aîné de Jérémie Renier.

Acteur de théâtre, il se fait connaître par le grand public grâce au rôle de Hugo dans la série Septième Ciel Belgique.

Source: Article "Yannick Renier" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Film and television actress Christine Adams was born in London, United Kingdom.

She starred on several British and American films and television series since early 2000s.

On television, she is known for roles as "Katherine Williams Osgood" on the British miniseries, NY-LON (2004); "Simone Hundin" on the American comedy-drama series, Pushing Daisies (2007) (2007-2009); as "Lena Boudreaux" on the short-lived ABC legal drama series, The Whole Truth (2010); and as "Mira" in FOX's science-fiction drama series, Terra Nova (2011).

In 2012, she starred, opposite Anthony LaPaglia, on the ABC drama series, Americana (2012). Adams appeared on several films, such as Submerged (2005), Batman Begins (2005), Eye of the Dolphin (2006), Green Flash (2008), Beneath the Blue (2010), TRON: Legacy (2010) and The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo (2011). She resides in Los Angeles with her husband and daughter.
data.name: Christine Adams

data.biography: Christine Adams (14 de agosto de 1974) es una actriz británica. Es conocida por interpretar a Jessica en Batman Begins (2005), Lena Boudreaux en The Whole Truth (2010-2011) y Lynn Pierce en Black Lightning (2018-2021).

data.name: クリスティーン・アダムス
คริสติน อดัมส์

data.biography:
​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.  

John Robinson (born October 25, 1985) is an American actor. He portrayed John McFarland in Gus Van Sant's Elephant and Stacy Peralta in the skateboarding film Lords of Dogtown.

Robinson enjoys snowboarding and played lacrosse in high school. He has also done some modeling. He is a 2005 graduate of the Oregon Episcopal School.

Description above from the Wikipedia article John Robinson, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: John Robinson

data.biography: 约翰·罗宾逊（John Robinson，1985年10月25日-），美国演员。他在格斯·范·桑特的《大象》中饰演约翰·麦克法兰，在滑板电影《狗镇领主》中饰演史黛西·佩拉尔塔。
data.name: 约翰·罗宾逊

data.biography: 約翰·羅賓遜（John Robinson，1985 年 10 月 25 日-），美國演員。他在格斯·範·桑特的《永珍之家》中飾演約翰·麥克法蘭，在滑板電影《狗鎮領主》中飾演史黛西·佩拉爾塔。
data.name: 約翰·羅賓遜

data.biography: 出生于香港，籍贯广东潮阳，现为无綫电视部头合约女艺员，曾参加1979年度香港小姐竞选。80年代中期更作为女一号主演两部广受欢迎的大型金庸古龙剧：《笑傲江湖》和《陆小凤之凤舞九天》。《笑傲江湖》中陈秀珠饰演任盈盈与周润发合作。后来又因翁美玲的去世，代替她出演《陆小凤之凤舞九天》，与万梓良合作。80年代的陈秀珠可谓是红了又红。 后来的剧集还有《大运河》、《黄大仙》、《大班密令》、《季节》、《誓不低头》、《狂龙》、《亚二一族》等。还饰演过90年内地电视剧《封神榜》中的女娲 。是极受欢迎的TVB当家花旦之一。
data.name: 陈秀珠

data.biography: 陳秀珠，生於香港，籍貫廣東潮陽。她在 1979 年參選香港小姐，雖三甲不入，很快在娛樂圈走紅，與 TVB 簽約。她在 1980 年代中期曾以女主角身份主演兩部廣受歡迎的大型金庸、古龍武俠劇：《笑傲江湖》和《陸小鳳之鳳舞九天》。2000 年代，陳秀珠繼續拍攝了不少無綫電視劇。她曾多次被提名《萬千星輝頒獎典禮》最佳女配角。陳秀珠近年為照顧兒子而減產，但仍以以一年一劇的形式於幕前演出。於 2020 年 7 月離開無綫。
data.name: 陳秀珠

data.biography:
Jack Hickey is an award winning Irish television and film actor and director. Jack graduated from the Gaiety School of Acting in 2010

In 2017, he joined the cast of Emmerdale, as Matt, the father of Carly's (Gemma Atkinson) child. As an actor, Hickey also made appearances in Game Of Thrones, Penny Dreadful and Jericho. He also appeared in the feature films Mary Shelley and Sea Fever alongside Hermione Corfield. His directorial debut film Cynthia won awards at the Galway Film Fleadh and the Irish Film Festival in London. It was also long-listed for the 92nd Academy Awards. The film was made by his production company Cooper Alley Productions he runs with his sister Lara Hickey.

In 2022, he joined the cast of Netflix series Vikings: Valhalla as Richard II, Duke of Normandy.

He had a role in the 2024 police procedural drama Borderline. In August 2024, he joined the cast of the sports film Saipan as Niall Quinn, appearing alongside Steve Coogan.
data.name: Jack Hickey

data.biography: 何昊阳，中央电视台联合日本TBS电视台《华流游美》娱乐节目主持人，音乐录影带，内地歌手罗中旭歌曲《你醒来我醒来》MTV女主角。多家时尚杂志社封面模特，演出过众多影视作品。
何昊陽，中央電視台聯合日本 TBS 電視台《華流遊美》娛樂節目主持人，音樂錄影帶，內地歌手羅中旭歌曲《你醒來我醒來》MTV 女主角。多家時尚雜誌社封面模特，演出過眾多影視作品。
data.name: 何昊陽

data.biography: Shecky Greene (born Fred Sheldon Greenfield; April 8, 1926) was an American comedian. He is known for his nightclub performances in Las Vegas, Nevada, where he became a headliner in the 1950s and '60s. He has appeared in several films, including Tony Rome; History of the World, Part I; and Splash. In television, he has guest-starred on such television shows as Love, American Style and Combat!, and later Laverne & Shirley and Mad About You.
data.name: Shecky Greene

data.biography: 谢基·格林（出生于弗雷德·谢尔顿·格林菲尔德;1926 年 4 月 8 日）是美国喜剧演员。

data.biography: 謝基·格林（出生於弗雷德·謝爾頓·格林菲爾德; 1926 年 4 月 8 日）是美國喜劇演員。
data.name: 謝基·格林

data.biography: Actorul Denis Hanganu provine dint-o familie de moldoveni din localitatea Rasesti, este nascut in Husi, judetul Vaslui, la data de 07.06.1994, oras in care a absolvit Colegiul National "Cuza-Voda", in anul 2013. In perioada scolii, pe plan local, se implica in numeroase activitati culturale, joaca si regizeaza momente artistice si piese de teatru. Cu putine resurse materiale si financiare, dar cu talent si cu o netarmurita dragoste pentru aspiratiile sale, reuseste sa devina student al U.N.A.T.C. "I.L. Caragiale" din Bucuresti, institut superior de invatamant pe care il finalizeaza in 2018, an in care incep sa apara diferite oferte ale unor producatori de televiziune si film.
data.name: Denis Hanganu

data.biography: Roger Cross is a Jamaican-born Canadian film and television actor, best known for playing recurring and leading television characters CTU Agent Curtis Manning on "24", Travis Verta on "Continuum", Staff Sergeant Boyd Bloom on "Motive", and Six / Griffin Jones on "Dark Matter". He is a graduate in Aviation and General Studies from Trinity Western University in Langley, B.C., Canada.
data.name: Roger Cross

data.biography:
Francine Joy Drescher (born September 30, 1957) is an American actress, comedian, writer, activist, and trade union leader. Drescher is known for her role as Fran Fine in the television sitcom The Nanny (1993–1999).

Drescher made her screen debut with a small role in the 1977 film Saturday Night Fever, and later appeared in American Hot Wax (1978) and Wes Craven's horror tale Stranger in Our House (1978). In the 1980s, she gained recognition as a comedic actress in the films Gorp (1980), The Hollywood Knights (1980), Doctor Detroit (1983), This Is Spinal Tap (1984), and UHF (1989) while establishing a television career with guest appearances on several series. In 1993, she achieved wider fame as Fran Fine in her own sitcom vehicle The Nanny, for which she was nominated for two Emmy Awards and two Golden Globe Awards for Best Actress in a Comedy Television Series during the show's run. In the 2000s, Drescher reinforced her position as a leading sitcom star with Living with Fran and Happily Divorced. Since 2012, she has starred in the animated Hotel Transylvania film series.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Fran Drescher, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Fran Drescher

data.biography: Η Φραν Ντρέσερ (Francine Joy "Fran" Drescher, 30 Σεπτεμβρίου 1957) είναι Αμερικανίδα κινηματογραφική και τηλεοπτική ηθοποιός, κωμικός, σεναριογράφος, σκηνοθέτης τηλεόρασης, τηλεοπτική παραγωγός, συγγραφέας, ακτιβίστρια, τραγουδίστρια και πολιτική λομπίστρια. Η Ντρέσερ είναι καλύτερα γνωστή από το ρόλο της ως Φραν Φάιν στην τηλεοπτική σειρά Τhe Nanny, για τον οποίο προτάθηκε για δύο Emmys και δύο Χρυσές Σφαίρες.
弗朗辛·乔伊·德雷舍尔（生于 1957 年 9 月 30 日）是美国女演员、喜剧演员、作家、活动家和工会领袖。
data.name: 弗朗辛·德雷舍尔

data.biography: 弗朗辛·喬伊·德雷捨爾（生於 1957 年 9 月 30 日）是美國女演員、喜劇演員、作家、活動家和工會領袖。
data.name: 弗朗辛·德雷捨爾

data.biography:
Francine Joy Drescher (nacida el 30 de septiembre de 1957) es una actriz, comediante, escritora, activista y líder sindical estadounidense. Drescher es conocida por su papel de Fran Fine en la comedia televisiva The Nanny (1993-1999).

Drescher debutó en la gran pantalla con un pequeño papel en la película Fiebre del sábado noche (1977), y posteriormente apareció en American Hot Wax (1978) y en la historia de terror de Wes Craven, Un extraño en nuestra casa (1978). En la década de 1980, alcanzó el reconocimiento como actriz cómica en las películas Gorp (1980), The Hollywood Knights (1980), Doctor Detroit (1983), This Is Spinal Tap (1984) y UHF (1989), a la vez que forjaba una carrera televisiva con apariciones especiales en varias series. En 1993, alcanzó gran fama como Fran Fine en su propia comedia, The Nanny, por la que fue nominada a dos premios Emmy y dos Globos de Oro a Mejor Actriz en una Serie de Televisión de Comedia durante su emisión. En la década de 2000, Drescher consolidó su posición como estrella destacada de comedias con Living with Fran y Happily Divorced. Desde 2012, ha protagonizado la serie animada Hotel Transylvania.

Descripción anterior del artículo de Wikipedia sobre Fran Drescher, con licencia CC-BY-SA. Lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Cecil Taylor Nichols (born March 3, 1959 in Lansing, Michigan) is an American actor best known for roles in the Whit Stillman films Metropolitan, Barcelona, and The Last Days of Disco. His characters in these films were insecure, stuttering sidekicks to those of the more outgoing Chris Eigeman. Nichols and Eigeman also played minor roles in the independent film The Next Step, released in 1997, of which Nichols was an associate producer.
data.name: Taylor Nichols

data.name: 泰勒·尼科尔斯

last_episode_to_air.name: Razzmatazz
last_episode_to_air.overview: Buộc phải trốn chạy và cạn kiệt thời gian, Peter và Isabel mạo hiểm mạng sống để vạch trần âm mưu, trước khi bị bịt miệng vĩnh viễn.

data.name: Đặc vụ đêm
data.overview: Bắt tay sau cuộc điện thoại lúc nửa đêm, một đặc vụ FBI và một chuyên gia an ninh mạng phải triệt phá mạng lưới âm mưu chính trị đang ngày một lớn mạnh.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Cuộc truy lùng một đặc vụ CIA bị buộc tội tiết lộ bí mật khiến Peter và Rose rơi vào tầm ngắm của một trung gian tình báo tàn nhẫn và một tội phạm chiến tranh nguy hiểm.

data.name: Một Tình Yêu Bất Ngờ Đến
data.overview: Một bộ phim hài tình cảm nhẹ nhàng, tràn ngập tiếng cười. Khi một streamer tư vấn tình cảm của năm 2025 bị cuốn vào cuốn tiểu thuyết lãng mạn kiểu cũ, cô đã chạm trán anh sếp tổng ngang ngược năm 1999, trông tưởng vô hại mà rất xảo quyệt. Màn đối đầu cuối cùng giữa lối mòn và gậy ông đập lưng ông của cả hai chính thức mở ra, ai sẽ là người giành phần thắng sau cùng? Để trở về thế giới hiện thực quen thuộc, streamer tư vấn tình cảm Lâm Hoan Nhi bắt đầu tung ra hàng loạt chiêu thức chinh phục sếp tổng ngang ngược Cao Hải Minh. Thế nhưng, thông minh quá hóa phản tác dụng. Khi đã dốc hết sức vượt ải và buộc phải rời khỏi thế giới trong sách, cô mới nhận ra mình đã lún sâu từ lâu, chẳng nỡ rời đi. Từ "muốn đi mà vẫn phải ở lại" đến "muốn ở lại nhưng vẫn phải đi", ở đoạn kết của câu chuyện, liệu những người yêu nhau có thể nên duyên trọn vẹn?

data.biography:
Wang Yuwen (also credited as 王玉雯 or Uvin Wang) is a talented Chinese actress born on May 27, 1997, in Wuhan, Hubei Province, China. Known for her graceful screen presence and expressive performances, Wang has become one of the standout faces of contemporary Chinese television and cinema.

She began her career as a teenager and quickly rose to prominence with memorable roles in dramas such as Super Star Academy (2016), Rush to the Dead Summer (2017), and Secret of the Three Kingdoms (2018). Her versatility spans romance, fantasy, and historical genres, captivating audiences with characters like Min Hui in The Love You Give Me and Feng Ruche in Novoland: The Castle in the Sky 2.

Wang has appeared in over 35 productions, including hit series like Once We Get Married, Nobody Knows, Growing Pain, and An Elephant Sitting Still. As of 2025, she continues to lead major roles in new projects, showing no signs of slowing down.

With her growing fan base and expanding creative range, Wang Yuwen remains a rising star to watch in the Asian entertainment industry.
data.name: Wang Yuwen

data.biography: 王玉雯，1997年出生，中国内地女演员，毕业于北京舞蹈学院。2015年，主演青春言情微电影《数字恋爱》从而正式进入演艺圈。2016年，主演青春校园超能力网络剧《超星星学园》；同年，参演根据郭敬明同名小说改编的青春偶像剧《夏至未至》。2017年，参演顾长卫执导的青春校园影片《遇见你真好》。2018年2月16日，参演的由胡波执导的情感伦理片《大象席地而坐》在德国柏林电影节放映，在片中饰演黄玲，以独特的气质和出彩的表演得到许多关注。同年，参演三国题材古装剧《三国机密之潜龙在渊》，在剧中饰演曹操之女曹节。2018年，在东方奇幻剧《九州天空城2》中饰演女主风如澈，从一个闯荡江湖的街头野丫头成长为一代女羽皇。2019年，与吴希泽搭档主演古代青春校园喜剧《长安少年行》。2019年，参演的都市情感励志剧《少年派》登陆湖南卫视，饰演邓小琪，气质高雅文静，又自信神秘。同年，在叶京导演电影《原来我们如此陌生》中，饰演女主关燕。
data.name: 王玉雯

data.biography: Vương Ngọc Văn, là một nữ diễn viên và vũ công người Trung Quốc. Cô được biết đến qua vai diễn Cố Hề Hề trong Chỉ là quan hệ hôn nhân và Mẫn Tuệ trong Tình yêu anh dành cho em
data.name: Vương Ngọc Văn

data.biography: Wang Yuwen, nascida em Wuhan, província de Hubei, em 28 de maio de 1997, é uma atriz da China continental e se formou na Beijing Dance Academy.

王玉雯，1997 年出生，中國內地女演員，畢業於北京舞蹈學院。2015 年，主演青春言情微電影《數字戀愛》從而正式進入演藝圈。2016 年，主演青春校園超能力網絡劇《超星星學園》；同年，參演根據郭敬明同名小説改編的青春偶像劇《夏至未至》。2017 年，參演顧長衞執導的青春校園影片《遇見你真好》。2018 年 2 月 16 日，參演的由胡波執導的情感倫理片《大象席地而坐》在德國柏林電影節放映，在片中飾演黃玲，以獨特的氣質和出彩的表演得到許多關注。同年，參演三國題材古裝劇《三國機密之潛龍在淵》，在劇中飾演曹操之女曹節。2018 年，在東方奇幻劇《九州天空城 2》中飾演女主風如澈，從一個闖蕩江湖的街頭野丫頭成長為一代女羽皇。2019 年，與吳希澤搭檔主演古代青春校園喜劇《長安少年行》。2019 年，參演的都市情感勵志劇《少年派》登陸湖南衞視，飾演鄧小琪，氣質高雅文靜，又自信神秘。同年，在葉京導演電影《原來我們如此陌生》中，飾演女主關燕。
data.name: 王玉雯
